Abandoned Hall.effect: When a player plays a spell, they may give a unit they control here +1 :rb_might: this turn.

Acceptable Losses.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Each player kills one of their gear.

Baron Nashor.effect:
As you play me, add the Baron Pit battlefield token to the board if it's not there already. If you do, I enter there. (It has "Units can move here from anywhere.")
I can't be chosen by enemy spells and abilities.
Other friendly units have +2 :rb_might:.

Diana, Lunari.effect: When a showdown begins here, you may pay :rb_energy_1:. If you do, [Predict], then reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a spell, draw it. (To Predict, look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

Fizz, Trickster.effect: When you play me, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost no more than :rb_energy_3:, ignoring its Energy cost. Recycle that spell after you play it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)

Flash.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Move up to 2 friendly units to base.

Gust.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Return a unit at a battlefield with 3 :rb_might: or less to its owner's hand.

Hard Bargain.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays :rb_energy_2:.

Hwei, Brooding Painter.effect: When I move, draw 1, then discard 1. Then, do the following based on the discarded card's type:Spell — Draw 1.Gear — Ready up to 2 runes.Unit — Give me +3 :rb_might: this turn.

Moonfall.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Choose a battlefield where you have units. You may move up to one enemy unit to that battlefield. Then give enemy units there -2 :rb_might: this turn.

Ravenbloom Conservatory.effect: When you defend here, reveal the top card of your Main Deck. If it's a spell, put it in your hand. Otherwise, recycle it.

Ravenbloom Student.effect: When you play a spell, give me +1 :rb_might: this turn.

Ride the Wind.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a friendly unit and ready it.

Singularity.effect: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

Smoke Screen.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit -4 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

Stacked Deck.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

Star-Crossed.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Return a friendly unit and an enemy unit to their owners' hands.

Stupefy.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit -1 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:. Draw 1.

Targon's Peak.effect: When you conquer here, ready up to 2 runes at the end of this turn.

Tideturner.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
When you play me, you may choose a unit you control at another location. Move me to its location and it to my original location.

Traveling Merchant.effect: When I move, discard 1, then draw 1.

Turn to Dust.effect: Give a gear [Temporary]. (Kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)

Vex, Apathetic.effect:
[Deflect] (Opponents must pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to choose me with a spell or ability.)
When an opponent plays a unit while I'm at a battlefield, [Stun] it. They can't move it this turn. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

Vex, Cheerless.effect: While I'm in combat, friendly spells cost :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_rainbow: less to a minimum of :rb_energy_1:, and enemy spells cost :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_rainbow: more.

Eclipse.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit -4 :rb_might: this turn.
[Predict]. (Look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

Kha'Zix, Mutating Horror.effect:
[Ambush] (You may play me as a [Reaction] to a battlefield where you have units.)
When I attack or defend, if an enemy unit is alone here, give me +2 :rb_might: this turn and gain 2 XP.

Rebuke.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

Seat of Power.effect: When you conquer here, draw 1 for each other battlefield you or allies control.

Sprite Fountain.effect:
[Temporary] (Kill this at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)
When you play this, play a ready 3 :rb_might: Sprite unit token with [Temporary] to your base.
[Deathknell][>] Repeat this gear's play effect. (When this dies, get the effect.)

Switcheroo.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Swap the Might of two units at the same battlefield this turn.

The Arena's Greatest.effect: At the start of each player's first Beginning Phase, that player gains 1 point.

Consult the Past.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Draw 2.

Frigid Jewel.effect: When you draw your second card each turn, give a friendly unit +2 :rb_might: this turn.

Invert Timelines.effect: Each player discards their hand, then draws 4.

Abandon.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Counter a spell. Return it to its owner's hand instead of putting it in their trash.
[Predict]. (Look at the top card of your Main Deck. You may recycle it.)

Eager Apprentice.effect: While I'm at a battlefield, the Energy costs for spells you play is reduced by :rb_energy_1:, to a minimum of :rb_energy_1:.

Angler Beast.effect: When you play me, return all units with 2 :rb_might: or less to their owners' hands.

Downwell.effect: Return all units and gear to their owners' hands.

Fading Memories.effect: Give a unit at a battlefield or a gear [Temporary]. (Kill it at the start of its controller's Beginning Phase, before scoring.)

Last Rites.effect: [Equip] — :rb_rune_chaos:, Recycle 2 cards from your trash (Pay the cost: Attach this to a unit you control.)

Mindsplitter.effect: When you play me, choose an opponent. They reveal their hand. Choose a card from it, and they discard that card.

Unchecked Power.effect: Exhaust all friendly units, then deal 12 to ALL units at battlefields.

Existential Dread.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
[Stun] an attacking enemy unit. If it's already stunned, return it to its owner's hand instead. (A stunned unit doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)

Plundering Poro.effect: When I conquer, play a Gold gear token exhausted.

Startipped Peak.effect: When you hold here, you may channel 1 rune exhausted.

Thousand-Tailed Watcher.effect:
[Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When you play me, give enemy units -3 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

Maddened Marauder.effect:
[Tank] (I must be assigned combat damage first.)
When you play me, move a unit from a battlefield to its base.

Retreat.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Return a friendly unit to its owner's hand. Its owner channels 1 rune exhausted.

Sigil of the Storm.effect: When you conquer here, you must recycle one of your runes. (This doesn’t choose anything.)

Time Warp.effect: Take a turn after this one. Banish this.

Hallowed Tomb.effect: When you hold here, you may return your Chosen Champion from your trash to your Champion Zone if it is empty.

Wages of Pain.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Deal 3 to a unit at a battlefield. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.

Edge of Night.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
When you play this from face down, attach it to a unit you control (here).
[Equip] :rb_rune_chaos: (:rb_rune_chaos:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

Dr. Mundo, Expert.effect:
My Might is increased by the number of cards in your trash.
At the start of your Beginning Phase, recycle 3 from your trash.

Treasure Hoard.effect: When you conquer here, you may pay :rb_energy_1: to play a Gold gear token exhausted.
